response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically versatile Staff-level engineer with a long career and recent hands-on involvement in MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure at Naver, which is directly relevant to the role's key technologies. However, the position's core requirement of 8+ years delivering AI-driven production solutions is not met — substantive AI/GenAI work appears only in the current role beginning April 2025. Python is entirely absent from the resume despite being a primary required language, and there is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI, all of which are central to the Staff Forward Deployed Engineer responsibilities.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise across multiple Staff-level engagements, directly matching one of the two primary required languages
Current Naver role includes MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a specific key technology called out in the job description
Broad systems experience spanning high-throughput data integration, cloud (AWS CDK), and platform architecture, supporting fast onboarding to new technical domains
concerns: Python is absent from the resume entirely, despite being the dominant language in the job's required qualifications and key technologies
The mandatory 8+ years of AI solution delivery is not evidenced — GenAI and agentic work is confined to the current role beginning April 2025, representing roughly 13 months of exposure
No mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM observability or evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, which constitute the primary day-to-day technical scope of this role

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling at current role
